schema: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_orders;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_users;
CREATE TABLE benchmark_users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

CREATE TABLE benchmark_orders (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, order_date DATE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES benchmark_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
mysql.insertOrder: INSERT INTO benchmark_orders (id,user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?);
mysql.join: SELECT u.name, o.amount, o.order_date FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > ? LIMIT 100;
mysql.aggregate: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) as total_spent, COUNT(o.id) as order_count FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING total_spent > ?;

schema: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_orders CASCADE;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_users CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE benchmark_users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE benchmark_orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT REFERENCES benchmark_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, order_date DATE NOT NULL);
postgresql.insertOrder: INSERT INTO benchmark_orders (id,user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (?,?, ?, ?);
postgresql.join: SELECT u.name, o.amount, o.order_date FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > ? LIMIT 100;
postgresql.aggregate: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) as total_spent, COUNT(o.id) as order_count FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING SUM(o.amount) > ?;

schema: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_orders;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_users;
CREATE TABLE benchmark_users (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

CREATE TABLE benchmark_orders (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, order_date DATE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES benchmark_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
mariadb.insertOrder: INSERT INTO benchmark_orders (id,user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (?,?, ?, ?);
mariadb.join: SELECT u.name, o.amount, o.order_date FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > ? LIMIT 100;
mariadb.aggregate: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) as total_spent, COUNT(o.id) as order_count FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING total_spent > ?;

schema: BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE benchmark_orders'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN NULL; END;
BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'DROP TABLE benchmark_users'; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN NULL; END;
CREATE TABLE benchmark_users ( id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

CREATE TABLE benchmark_orders (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, user_id NUMBER NOT NULL, amount NUMBER(10,2) NOT NULL, order_date DATE NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES benchmark_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
oraclesql.insertOrder: INSERT INTO benchmark_orders (id,user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (?,?, ?, ?)
oraclesql.join: SELECT u.name, o.amount, o.order_date FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > ? FETCH FIRST 100 ROWS ONLY
oraclesql.aggregate: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM benchmark_users u JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING SUM(o.amount) > ?

schema: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_users
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS benchmark_orders
CREATE TABLE benchmark_users (id UInt32, name String, email String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id ;
CREATE TABLE benchmark_orders (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Decimal(10,2), order_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (user_id, order_date) ;
clickhouse.insertUser: INSERT INTO benchmark_users (id, name, email) VALUES (?, ?, ?) ;
clickhouse.insertOrder: INSERT INTO benchmark_orders (id, user_id, amount, order_date) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?) ;
clickhouse.join: SELECT u.name, o.amount, o.order_date FROM benchmark_users u INNER JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount > ? LIMIT 100 ;
clickhouse.aggregate: SELECT u.name, SUM(o.amount) AS total_spent, COUNT() AS order_count FROM benchmark_users u INNER JOIN benchmark_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.name HAVING SUM(o.amount) > ? ;
